category_sources: Official repository at https://github.com/markwal/GPX describes GPX as a Gcode to x3g conversion post processor.
source_facts.description: "Gcode to x3g converter for 3D printers running Sailfish".
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo is https://github.com/markwal/GPX and the official repository uses the name GPX.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains usage documentation for the gpx command.
source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/markwal/GPX; per instructions repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official repository README documents the gpx CLI usage and conversion options.
source_facts.description identifies Gcode to x3g conversion for Sailfish 3D printers.
